ask_user_with_options: ask the user a simple yes no question with predefined options and a default choice
ask_user_free_text: ask the user an open ended question that accepts free text response with a default value
question_tool_multi_select: ask the user up to four questions with multiple selection options and labeled choices
question_tool_single_choice: ask the user a single question with numbered options and descriptions for each choice
question_tool_gather_preferences: ask the user to clarify ambiguous instructions by presenting implementation choices and gathering preferences
